title: React Hooks Essentials
description: Assess understanding of the most common React hooks and their rules.

questions.question: Which hook is used to store local component state?
The Rules of Hooks require hooks to be called...
options: At the top level of React function components

questions.question: What is a common use case for useEffect?
options: Handling side effects like data fetching

questions.question: When should useRef be preferred over useState?
options: When storing mutable values across renders without rerendering

questions.question: How can you share state logic between components without HOCs?
Which dependency array ensures an effect runs only once?
What happens if you omit dependencies the effect uses?
options: You risk stale values and inconsistent behavior

questions.question: Which hook returns a memoized callback to avoid re-creating functions?
